title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poorvika Mobiles

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poorvika Mobiles
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Poorvika Mobiles in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poorvika Mobiles:
Poorvika Mobiles is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles!
